description: Every capability claim must ground in one of these sources. Only promoting sources can move a capability to 'supported'.

evidence_sources.note: capability explicitly stated and pinned by the user

rules: A 'supported' capability MUST cite a promoting evidence id that resolves to a real source.
A fabricated or unresolvable evidence id fails the report.
Capabilities grounded only in [INFERENCE] or [SUPUESTO] stay 'validation pending'.
